cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this question. So the story is about Lao Yang, who wanted to be a writer when he was younger. He used to write stories and send them to editors, but never got any responses. Now he works in a factory and still reads when he can. His daughter needs to write a school article titled "My Father," so he helps her by writing it about himself. He's confident that the teacher will like it, but the teacher says the article digressed from the subject. The question is asking what Lao Yang hoped for
